title: Apple Charlotte
body:
Born from thrift—uses up day-old bread and windfall apples. Tastes like fall.

· 6 firm tart apples (Granny Smith), peeled and sliced
· ½ cup sugar
· 1 teaspoon cinnamon
· Zest and juice of 1 lemon
· 2 tablespoons butter
· Loaf of white bread (sliced, crusts trimmed)
· ¼ cup melted butter, more as needed

source.label: Marion Harland · Common Sense in the Household · 1871
